description: Synthetic privacy fixture for Todo 5 — exercises the readOnly-checkbox-remnant branch. The fixture carries a deliberately-leaky form HTML blob (`fixtureFormHtml`) containing `id="readOnly"` so the validator's READ_ONLY_REMNANT detection path can fire without modifying the production tree. Today the production tree is clean, so pairing this fixture with a clean tree must emit `PRIVACY NOT READY: READ_ONLY_REMNANT` and exit 1.
